name: docs-wiki
description: Non-blocking helper toolkit for creating, organising, editing, validating, and auditing a project Wiki. Adapts to GitHub Wiki sibling repos, in-repo wiki/ folders, GitLab Wiki, and Azure DevOps Wiki. Provides flat-namespace + filename-uniqueness + internal-link conventions, Mermaid diagram authoring rules, PlantUML BPMN-swimlane authoring + render/embed pipeline, broken-link sweeps, and code-vs-wiki drift reporting. Advisory only — it does NOT gate or block git push, force-push, or Write/Edit. Does NOT handle wiki-to-memory sync — that is a separate future plugin.
